notes: UFH zones set for max 25C slab temp, radiators and MVHR duct heater are open. Passivhaus Institute certified Low-Energy Building. F1145 GSHP compressor uses old-school on-off control rather than a variable-speed inverter drive. Since the diverter valve is inside the GSHP unit casing - hence separate output pipes for DHW and CH - there are two heat meters, one for each flow circuit. DHW versus CH is inferred by comparing the flow rates from the meters. Solar PV divert to immersion heater retired October 2025.
